definitions.usage_example: I have lived here since 2010.
definitions.usage_example_es: He vivido aquí desde 2010.
definitions.usage_context_en: From a particular time in the past until a later time.
definitions.usage_context_es: Desde un momento particular en el pasado hasta un momento posterior.

definitions.usage_example: She sat beside me.
definitions.usage_example_es: Ella se sentó junto a mí.
definitions.usage_context_en: A synonym for 'next to'; at the side of.
definitions.usage_context_es: Un sinónimo de 'next to'; al lado de.

definitions.usage_example: The key was underneath the mat.
definitions.usage_example_es: La llave estaba debajo del tapete.
definitions.usage_context_en: Situated directly below; a stronger or more formal version of 'under'.
definitions.usage_context_es: Situado directamente debajo; una versión más fuerte o formal de 'under'.

definitions.usage_example: The ground beneath our feet.
definitions.usage_example_es: El suelo bajo nuestros pies.
definitions.usage_context_en: A formal or literary word for 'under' or 'below'.
definitions.usage_context_es: Una palabra formal o literaria para 'under' o 'below'.

definitions.usage_example: The village is beyond those hills.
definitions.usage_example_es: El pueblo está más allá de esas colinas.
definitions.usage_context_en: At or to the further side of something; past the limits of.
definitions.usage_context_es: En o hacia el lado más lejano de algo; pasando los límites de.

definitions.usage_example: That is beyond my understanding.
definitions.usage_example_es: Eso está más allá de mi entendimiento.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to mean 'outside the limits of' (e.g., understanding, belief).
definitions.usage_context_es: Usado para significar 'fuera de los límites de' (ej. entendimiento, creencia).

definitions.usage_example: He is among friends.
definitions.usage_example_es: Él está entre amigos.
definitions.usage_context_en: Situated in the middle of a group of three or more (compare 'between').
definitions.usage_context_es: Situado en medio de un grupo de tres o más (compara con 'between').

definitions.usage_example: He is within the building.
definitions.usage_example_es: Él está dentro del edificio.
definitions.usage_context_en: Inside the limits of an area or space.
definitions.usage_context_es: Dentro de los límites de un área o espacio.

definitions.usage_example: I will be back within an hour.
definitions.usage_example_es: Volveré en (dentro de) una hora.
definitions.usage_context_en: Happening inside a particular period of time.
definitions.usage_context_es: Que sucede dentro de un período de tiempo particular.

definitions.meaning: A lo largo de / Por todo
definitions.usage_example: It rained throughout the day.
definitions.usage_example_es: Llovió a lo largo del día.
definitions.usage_context_en: In every part of a place or object; from beginning to end of an event.
definitions.usage_context_es: En cada parte de un lugar u objeto; de principio a fin de un evento.

definitions.usage_example: We flew to Paris via London.
definitions.usage_example_es: Volamos a París vía Londres.
definitions.usage_context_en: Traveling through a place en route to a destination.
definitions.usage_context_es: Viajando a través de un lugar en ruta a un destino.

definitions.usage_example: He placed the crown upon his head.
definitions.usage_example_es: Él colocó la corona sobre su cabeza.
definitions.usage_context_en: A more formal or literary version of 'on'.
definitions.usage_context_es: Una versión más formal o literaria de 'on'.

definitions.usage_example: He was late because of the traffic.
definitions.usage_example_es: Llegó tarde a causa del tráfico.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to give the reason for something (synonym of 'due to').
definitions.usage_context_es: Usado para dar la razón de algo (sinónimo de 'due to').

definitions.usage_example: The game was canceled due to the rain.
definitions.usage_example_es: El partido fue cancelado debido a la lluvia.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to give the reason for something (synonym of 'because of').
definitions.usage_context_es: Usado para dar la razón de algo (sinónimo de 'because of').

definitions.usage_example: We succeeded thanks to your help.
definitions.usage_example_es: Tuvimos éxito gracias a tu ayuda.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to show a positive reason for a good outcome.
definitions.usage_context_es: Usado para mostrar una razón positiva para un buen resultado.

definitions.usage_example: According to the news, it will rain tomorrow.
definitions.usage_example_es: Según las noticias, lloverá mañana.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to cite the source of information.
definitions.usage_context_es: Usado para citar la fuente de la información.

definitions.usage_example: I will have tea instead of coffee.
definitions.usage_example_es: Tomaré té en lugar de café.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to indicate a replacement or alternative.
definitions.usage_context_es: Usado para indicar un reemplazo o alternativa.

definitions.usage_example: The store is open every day apart from Sunday.
definitions.usage_example_es: La tienda está abierta todos los días excepto el domingo.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to mean 'except for' or 'not including'.
definitions.usage_context_es: Usado para significar 'excepto por' o 'sin incluir'.

definitions.usage_example: Apart from the salary, the job is great.
definitions.usage_example_es: Además del salario, el trabajo es genial.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to mean 'in addition to'.
definitions.usage_context_es: Usado para significar 'además de'.

definitions.usage_example: Aside from the weather, the trip was great.
definitions.usage_example_es: Aparte del clima, el viaje fue genial.
definitions.usage_context_en: In addition to; except for.
definitions.usage_context_es: Además de; excepto por.
